text.title: Continuous Discovery Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: Only 1 observation (below N>=5 floor); uses banned word 'validated'; sources not from >=2 independent classes; ost_delta and assumptions_tested missing.

list.pattern: Any agent output containing the word 'validated'.
Finding published from a single source (must span >=2 source types).
Opportunity worded as a feature ('add filter X').
